test-eleventy
  • Home
  • About

Eleventy + Tailwind v4 obfuscation test

This static-site generator emits multiple HTML pages from Nunjucks templates. The obfuscator runs in CLI mode against the generated _site/ directory, exercising the HTML extractor on every output page.

Card example

Static class strings inside Nunjucks templates flow through the tailwindcss-obfuscator/cli post-build pass.

See the About page →
  • Tailwind classes inside Nunjucks layout
  • Tailwind classes inside Nunjucks page
  • Tailwind classes inside Markdown body (via {:class=""})
Generated by Eleventy + Tailwind v4 + tailwindcss-obfuscator
